Project Name-Better testing framework to ascertain the scientific accuracy of the TARDIS

Objective - Look at the documentation to run the TARDIS documentation (http://tardis-sn.github.io/tardis) with refdata enabled. Run them locally on your machine and post the last part of the tests in an issue on the GitHub repository.

Issue Description-

I ran the test command provided in the documentation "pytest tardis --tardis-refdata=/path/to/tardis-refdata/" on my local machine and got the following results 

![tardis](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/84439872/163674515-112a4ce4-75b0-4d74-8abb-59d5a573a66b.PNG)
